data.content: Implementation review passed against the terminal-cue and workable-count acceptance criteria. Terminal Setlist styling now covers shipped and abandoned rows, while the selected execution-plan summary reports the remaining workable scheduled rows instead of the full scheduled total. The implementation had already passed bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Per user request, the branch was then merged onto local main for playtesting only and has not been pushed to origin/main.
